title: April
description:
一个专为Minecraft服务器设计的恶搞性插件，为游戏注入例如霉运、摔落增强、节肢帮手等荒诞与挑战！
A spoof plugin designed specifically for Minecraft servers to infuse the game with such absurdities and challenges as bad luck, fall enhancements, and knuckle-dragging helpers!
body:
# April - Minecraft Prank Plugin 🌟

# April - 我的世界恶搞插件 🌟

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-2025.1-blue?style=flat-square)  

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported_Ver-Paper1.21.X-success?style=flat-square)  

![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPL-green?style=flat-square)  

> **"Make survival mode extraordinary!"**  
> A prank plugin for Minecraft servers that injects absurdity and challenges!  
>  
> **"让生存模式不再平凡！"**  
> 专为《我的世界》服务器设计的恶搞插件，为游戏注入荒诞与挑战！

---

## 📦 Features | 功能一览

| Feature | Effect | 功能描述 | 效果 |
|---------|--------|----------|------|
| **🔥 Lava & Water Swap** | Lava "extinguishes" players, water burns! | **🔥岩浆与水（含雨）互换** | 岩浆可以《熄灭》玩家，水会灼烧！ |
| **🍀 Fortune→Misfortune** | "Fortune III" has 70% chance to make players owe items 😈 `A gamble, my friend` | **🍀时运变霉运** | 附魔"时运 III"有70%概率让玩家倒欠物品 😈 `这是一场豪赌` |
| **⚔️ Mob Multiplier** | Hit a creeper? Get 3 for free! `Modernized mob farm` | **⚔️攻击生物增殖** | 打苦力怕？送你三只！`现代化刷怪塔` |
| **🕷️ Bane of Arthropods→Helper** | Attacks spawn cobwebs on players `Free bondage play` | **🕷️节肢杀手变帮手** | 攻击蜘蛛类生物时生成蛛网 `免费捆绑play` |
| **🍖 Reverse Food** | Steak -3 hunger, Rotten Flesh +5 🌚 `Expired food FTW` | **🍖食物反向机制** | 牛排饱食度-3，腐肉+5 🌚 `过期食品才是硬通货` |
| **🌌 Ender Pearl Cannon** | Yeet yourself like a projectile! `Newton: Is this OK?` | **🌌末影珍珠弹射** | 使用后像炮弹般发射！`牛顿：这合理吗？` |

##### Preview: [Is this world right? Demo Video-Bilibili](https://b23.tv/x4LO8eI)  
##### 效果预览：[这世界对吗？演示视频-哔哩哔哩](https://b23.tv/x4LO8eI)

---

## 🚀 Quick Install | 快速安装

1. Download latest version:  
   下载最新版本：
2. Put into server `plugins` folder  
   放入服务器 `plugins` 文件夹
3. Restart server  
   重启服务器

---

## 🛠️ Commands & Permissions | 命令与权限

| Command | Description | 命令 | 描述 |
|---------|-------------|------|------|
| `/aqk`  | Check your debt | `/aqk` | 查看当前欠款 |

---

## 🛠️ PAPI Support | PAPI支持

| Variable | Description | 变量 | 描述 |
|----------|-------------|------|------|
| `%aqk_player_aqk%` | Player's current debt | `%aqk_player_aqk%` | 当前玩家欠款 |

---

## 🤝 Contribution | 贡献与反馈

Welcome **Issues** & **PRs**!  
欢迎提交 **Issue** 和 **Pull Request**!  

🔗 GitHub: [MCSFS/April](https://github.com/MCSFS/April)  

---

基于 **[GPL v3 协议](LICENSE)** 开源。

> Please retain copyright notice when modifying/distributing.  
> 修改或分发时请保留版权声明。
